dict.string: PermissionPilot Demo uses the camera to demonstrate the Camera permission.
PermissionPilot Demo uses the microphone to demonstrate the Microphone permission.
PermissionPilot Demo uses Bluetooth to demonstrate the Bluetooth permission.
PermissionPilot Demo uses your location to demonstrate the Location permission.
PermissionPilot Demo accesses contacts to demonstrate the Contacts permission.
PermissionPilot Demo accesses your photo library to demonstrate the Photos permission.
PermissionPilot Demo uses speech recognition to demonstrate the Speech Recognition permission.
PermissionPilot Demo accesses your calendars to demonstrate the Calendars permission.
PermissionPilot Demo accesses your calendars to demonstrate the Calendars permission.
PermissionPilot Demo accesses your reminders to demonstrate the Reminders permission.
PermissionPilot Demo accesses your reminders to demonstrate the Reminders permission.
PermissionPilot Demo sends Apple Events to demonstrate the Automation permission.
PermissionPilot Demo accesses the local network to demonstrate the Local Network permission.
